name: Cardiff (United Kingdom)

colors.symbolism: from the city's coat of arms

description: A horizontal bicolour of white over blue with the city's coat of arms (a red Welsh dragon and Cardiff arms) at the centre.
history: Adopted by Cardiff Council on 28 May 2008; the design replaced an earlier flag and incorporates the coat of arms of the City and County of Cardiff.

features.symbolism: Welsh national identity through the red dragon, with the city's seahorse supporters and Cardiff Castle imagery
